CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)
